lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused). No new errors or warnings introduced.

build.output: npm run build: compiled successfully. Pre-existing Turbopack workspace root warning only. All runbook routes listed in build output.

unit_tests.output: No unit tests for this area.

notes: All 7 acceptance criteria implemented. (1) Complete Runbook button calls updateRunbook with status=completed + completed_at, requires window.confirm. (2) Cancel Runbook button calls updateRunbook with status=cancelled, requires window.confirm. Both buttons hidden when isReadOnly. (3) Checkbox replaced with 4-button status group (pending/in_progress/completed/skipped); completed sets completed_at, others clear it. (4) Read-only banner shown for completed/cancelled runbooks; step buttons + notes textarea disabled. (5) Progress text 'X of Y steps completed · N in progress, N skipped' below progress bar. (6) Metadata footer with started_at, completed_at (if set), created_by (shows 'by you' when userId matches). (7) List view has All/Active/Completed/Cancelled filter tabs with client-side filtering; count updates with filter.
